dashboard.brandCopy: Dashboard shell split from preview composition.

topBar.title: AR and operations snapshot
topBar.description: Metrics and aging status extracted from the preview gallery as the new route-level home screen.

hero.title: Command center
hero.description: This route-level dashboard reuses the established panel language while keeping data static for now.

metricsSection.title: Key AR signals
metricsSection.description: Primary receivables and operational pressure indicators.

timeline.title: Recent cashflow and review activity
timeline.description: Route-level timeline retained from the preview while backend feeds are pending.

detailPanel.title: Dashboard context
detailPanel.subtitle: A compact summary rail for daily cashflow and review pressure before drilling into screens.
detailPanel.timelineDescription: Fast context from activity affecting AR and review workload.

items.label: Outreach
items.value: 9 reminders due before next business day

aging.brandCopy: Aging workspace route split from the preview gallery.

topBar.title: Bucket drill-down and invoice ledger
topBar.description: Receivables are grouped by billing age with rapid actions for escalation, exports, and follow-ups.

buckets.title: Aging distribution
buckets.description: Shared bucket cards preserved from preview for consistent cross-screen AR summaries.

ledger.title: Aging invoice table
ledger.description: Primary ledger table for AR records, preserving status rendering and compact grid density.
ledger.tableDescription: Date billed drives aging buckets and action prioritization.

detailPanel.title: Invoice detail
detailPanel.subtitle: Contextual summary for the selected aging record and related activity.
detailPanel.timelineDescription: Recent events tied to the selected record and its follow-up work.

clients.brandCopy: Client ledger route extracted from preview patterns with reusable table and timeline components.

topBar.title: Client ledger and payment history
topBar.description: Track account status, outstanding balances, and timeline activity for all billing clients.

metricsSection.title: Client health snapshot
metricsSection.description: Quick indicators for account volume, receivables pressure, and payment reliability.

clientTable.title: Client accounts
clientTable.description: Primary ledger showing contact owner, balance pressure, and payment behavior.
clientTable.tableDescription: Sorted for review by outstanding totals and aging pressure.

paymentHistory.title: Recent client activity
paymentHistory.description: Timeline feed for account-level payment and reminder events.
paymentHistory.timelineDescription: Recent transactions and updates impacting client AR.

detailPanel.title: Client context
detailPanel.subtitle: A quick summary rail for selected account health and recent activity.
detailPanel.timelineDescription: Recent events for the selected account and reminder workflow.

review.brandCopy: Review inbox route extracted from preview with queue, status controls, and audit diffs.

topBar.title: Admin review workspace
topBar.description: Review non-admin submissions and apply approve or deny actions before records flow into active AR.

queue.title: Pending changes
queue.description: Queue of proposed updates awaiting approval.
queue.tableDescription: Select one or more rows and apply review actions.

detailPanel.title: Review context
detailPanel.subtitle: Selected queue item metadata with before/after diff details.
detailPanel.timelineDescription: Queue-level events and SLA context for approvals.

audit.brandCopy: Audit workspace route extracted from preview timeline and diff patterns.

topBar.title: Change timeline and diff history
topBar.description: Review who changed what and inspect before/after values for billing actions.

timeline.title: Event timeline
timeline.description: Chronological feed of approval, denial, and escalation events.

ledger.title: Event index
ledger.description: Tabular index for selecting a specific event to inspect in the detail rail.
ledger.tableDescription: Choose an event to load its field-level before/after details.

detailPanel.title: Event details
detailPanel.subtitle: Field-level changes and metadata for the selected audit event.

expenses.brandCopy: Expense tracking route extracted from financial operations patterns with category and ledger views.

topBar.title: Expense tracking and budget analysis
topBar.description: Monitor cash outflow by category, track pending approvals, and reconcile expense records.

categories.title: Expense categories
categories.description: Cash outflow by category with trend context and budget pressure signals.

ledger.title: Expense transactions
ledger.description: Individual expenses and reimbursements with approval status context.
ledger.tableDescription: Sorted by most recent with pending approvals highlighted.

detailPanel.title: Expense details
detailPanel.subtitle: Contextual summary for the selected expense and related activity.
detailPanel.timelineDescription: Recent events tied to the selected record and approval workflow.
